name: cc-bcc-reply-to
description: Message with Cc, Bcc, and Reply-To headers (RFC 5322 section 3.6.3)
input:
From: sender@example.com
To: recipient@example.com
Cc: cc1@example.com, cc2@example.com
Bcc: bcc@example.com
Reply-To: replyto@example.com
Subject: All Address Headers
Date: Mon, 27 Jan 2026 10:00:00 +0000
Message-ID: <addr-123@example.com>

Message with all address header types.
expectedBody: Message with all address header types.
